item: Self-diagnosis and repair rail local foundation

built: Tenant-scoped selfRepairLog repository with Firestore and memory implementations
Deterministic failure-class analyzer for trial regression classes A, C, D, and E
Safe-repair allowlist logging for failureLog gap-label corrections and wall-entry candidates
Fix-brief generation with suspected file hints and required regression-wall receipt text
Morning report generation queued as ApprovalQueue email artifact with execute.service=selfRepair and noOutboundSend=true
Owner/admin-only run and log endpoints under /api/self-repair
hardBoundaries: No code edits are performed by the self-repair rail
No SOUL/schema/deploy changes are performed by the self-repair rail
No outbound email send executor is bound for selfRepair morning reports
All data reads go through tenant-scoped PlatformRepository.exportTenantData
Route access requires OWNER or OFFICE_ADMIN AccessContext
detectedTrialPatternsInTests: P1-W email rail down phrasing routes to C_INTENT_MISROUTING
P1-X evaporation tool unreachable from chat routes to C_INTENT_MISROUTING
P1-Y spa main drain follow-up routes to A_SINGLE_RAIL_CONCLUSION
Report-PDF attachment gap is logged as a safe gap_label_correction to capability_not_available
notDoneYet: Live staging run against a real day's Aquatrace conversations
Anthropic gateway analysis pass with usageLog cost entry
Owner-visible emailed morning report receipt after approval

verification.result: passed, 290 reachable commits and 4429 reachable objects checked
